history.summary: Initial Bottles setup for Lithuanian 7.3 with Indeo, D2GI, Windows XP mode, self-contained no-CD paths, verification and rollback.
Separates installation from fix automation; scripts no longer accept, copy, extract, or archive installation files.
Uses a win64 GE-Proton bottle, verifies interactive Ligos Indeo 5.11 installation, and adds optional direct Steam integration with working D2GI widescreen, Overlay, FPS counter and complete artwork.
Initializes Proton bookkeeping safely for the optional shared-prefix Steam path and adds clearly labeled historical, compatibility-guide and fix-project links.
